description: Send /api/* to the proxy Functions, /comp + /comp/* to the SSR Function (functions/comp/[[path]].ts — unmatched shapes fall back to the SPA shell), and /sitemap.xml to its Function. The static content pages (/, /about, /legal, /scoring/*) are also included so functions/_middleware.ts can 301 the glidecomp.pages.dev prod alias to glidecomp.com (Pages _redirects can't match hosts); on the real domain the middleware next()s straight through to the static asset. Everything else (JS/CSS/images/fonts, SPA shell rewrites) is a static asset. Checked in explicitly because Cloudflare's auto-generated routes manifest has stranded new prefixes (/api/user/, /api/u/) at 404 on preview deployments — see the user-files migration PR.
